landing.heroSubtitle: Personalized AI-powered study platform to help students master topics efficiently and stay motivated. With Nova Edu, you can save your time and efforts.
landing.feature3Desc: Get trophies and be at the top of the leaderboard

settings.title: Settings
settings.passwordShort: Password must be at least 6 characters long
settings.changePasswordHint: Change Password (leave blank to keep current password)
settings.helperKeepPassword: Leave blank to keep current password
settings.deleteAccountBody: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteConfirmBody: This will permanently delete your account and all your data (study sets, progress, classes, etc.). This action cannot be undone.

recommendations.reasonHighScoreOtherSet: You did well on {{setTitle}}! Try another set in {{topic}}.
recommendations.reasonBeginnerJourney: Start your learning journey with this beginner-friendly set!
recommendations.reasonTryGetStarted: Try this study set to get started!
recommendations.reasonNone: No recommendations available at this time.

dashboard.teacherSubtitle: Manage your classes and track student progress
dashboard.noAssignmentsStudentHint: Class work appears here only if you are enrolled in that class, or your teacher assigned the set to you personally.
dashboard.ruleBasedFallback: Practice more sets to get personalized recommendations.

studySets.title: Study Sets
studySets.offlineMode: ⚠️ Offline Mode - Only downloaded study sets are available
studySets.subject: Subject
studySets.emptyStudent: No study sets found. Start by exploring assigned sets or create your own.
studySets.emptyTeacher: No study sets found. Create your first study set!
studySets.assignDialogBody: To assign this study set, please go to the Classes page and select a class, then use the "Add Assignment" option.
studySets.mustOnlineDownload: You must be online to download study sets
studySets.removeDownloadFailed: Failed to remove downloaded study set
studySets.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this study set? This action cannot be undone.
studySets.loadDownloadedFailed: Failed to load downloaded study sets
studySets.editDialogAssignmentHint: Due date and session time limit apply to each class this set is assigned to.
studySets.editDialogNoClassAssignments: No class assignments found for this set (or you may not have access to edit them).
studySets.mathHelpLead: Wrap math in dollar signs. Between them, use LaTeX—the same kind of notation used in many textbooks. Normal words stay outside the $ signs.
studySets.mathHelpInlineDesc: Put one $ before the formula and one $ after it.
studySets.mathHelpInlineExample: Solve $x^2 - 5x + 6 = 0$. One root is $x=2$. Fractions: $\frac{1}{2}$, $\frac{a}{b}$. Root: $\sqrt{16}$.
studySets.mathHelpBlockDesc: Use double dollar signs $$ before and after the whole formula.
studySets.mathHelpSymbols: Examples you can copy: $\pi$, $\theta$, $\sum_{i=1}^{n} i$, $\infty$, $\pm$ — always inside $...$ or $$...$$.
studySets.mathHelpFootnote: Tip: A single $ with no closing $ appears as a normal dollar sign. For currency next to text, keep the price outside math or add a space.
studySets.mathFieldHint: Math: $…$ inline or $$…$$ centered — expand the guide above for examples.
studySets.questionExplanationOptionalHint: Shown after students submit practice, only for questions they missed.

createDialog.title: Create study set
createDialog.descriptionHelper: e.g. Students will practice factoring quadratics and solving with the formula.
createDialog.dueDateHelper: When students should finish this assignment. Leave empty for no deadline.
createDialog.timeLimitLabel: Time limit per session, in minutes (optional)
createDialog.timeLimitHelper: Enter the limit in minutes (max 1440). One practice attempt auto-submits when time runs out. Leave empty for no limit.
createDialog.assignToAllStudents: Assign to all students in this class
createDialog.assignLaterHint: You can also assign this set later from the study set details page.
createDialog.errQuizOptionsAll: All four options are required for multiple choice.
createDialog.visibilityPublic: Public — anyone signed in can find and use it; teachers can assign it to classes
createDialog.visibilityPrivate: Private — only you (and people you assign it to)
createDialog.visibilityClass: Class — students enrolled in the class below can open it without a separate assignment
createDialog.visibilityHelpPublic: Public sets appear for all teachers and students in the catalog.
createDialog.visibilityHelpPrivate: Private sets stay in “My sets” until you assign them or change visibility.
createDialog.visibilityHelpClass: Enrolled students (and you) see this set under class materials. You can still create assignments with due dates separately.
createDialog.errVisibilityClassRequired: Choose a class for class visibility.
createDialog.createFailedGeneric: Failed to create study set. Please try again.

practice.noAccess: This study set doesn't exist or you don't have access to it.
practice.noContentBody: This study set doesn't have any questions or flashcards yet.
practice.editToAddContent: Edit study set to add content
practice.feedbackIncorrect: Not quite — you can try again or move on.
practice.redoWrongNone: There are no incorrect graded questions to redo.
practice.scoreLine: You got {{correct}} out of {{total}} questions correct!
practice.aiNeedAnswer: Select or type an answer first to get an explanation.
practice.aiNotConfigured: AI is not enabled on the server (add GEMINI_API_KEY).
practice.suggestedNextFallback: Practice more sets to get personalized recommendations.

assignDialog.title: Assign study set
assignDialog.description: Choose a study set for this class. Students enrolled in the class will see it under assignments.
assignDialog.noSets: No study sets available. Create one under Study materials first.
assignDialog.dueHelper: Leave empty for open-ended practice. Students still see the set in their list.
assignDialog.timeLimitLabel: Time limit per session, in minutes (optional)
assignDialog.timeLimitHelper: Enter the limit in minutes (max 1440). If set, the practice session auto-submits when time runs out (one attempt timer).
assignDialog.feedbackEndOnly: Stricter: show score and breakdown after they finish (recommended for graded work)
assignDialog.feedbackImmediate: Practice mode: students can check answers while working
assignDialog.errorTimeLimit: Time limit must be between 1 and 1440 minutes.

assignToClassDialog.title: Assign to a class
assignToClassDialog.intro: This adds a class assignment with its own due date and optional session time limit. Public sets stay the same for everyone else — only students in the class you choose get this assignment.
assignToClassDialog.noClasses: No classes yet. Create one under My Classes.

classes.title: My Classes
classes.subject: Subject
classes.deleteConfirmBody: This will permanently delete the class and remove all student enrollments. Assignments may be affected.

gamification.title: Gamification
gamification.studentsOnly: Gamification features are available for students only.
gamification.leaderboardEmpty: No leaderboard data available yet. Start studying to earn points!
gamification.badgesEmpty: No badges available yet. Start studying to earn your first badge!

admin.deleteUserBody: This permanently removes the user account. This may fail if the user still has related data (classes, progress, etc.).
admin.deleteSetBody: This permanently removes the study set and its questions for all users.
admin.dashboardSubtitle: Manage users and moderate study sets.
